name: Compared to regular malpractice, is AI harder to win in LA?
description: Similar odds; need AI experts in CA.

mainEntity.name: Compared to regular malpractice, is AI harder to win in LA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Similar odds; need AI experts in CA.
acceptedAnswer.description: Slightly harder due to novelty, but winnable with experts. CA courts adapting. Key factors: (1) Emerging precedents; (2) Tech testimony; (3) Same elements. No bar yet.
